summary: Full backend + frontend testing of CoproManager (Belgian copropriete management). 31 pytest cases run covering Auth, Owners/Lots/Tenants, PCMN/Journals, Invoices/DistKeys, Meters, Banking, Documents. All 31 backend tests PASS. Frontend: login + navigation across all 9 sidebar pages verified. Found and fixed a critical Mixed Content bug on /meters and /documents (FastAPI trailing-slash 307 redirect causing HTTPS→HTTP fallback through the proxy). After fix, all pages load without console errors and Owner creation modal opens with proper data-testids.

minor.issue: CORS uses single FRONTEND_URL env (OK) but backend/.env still has unused CORS_ORIGINS='*' - cosmetic only
Accepts any 'match_to_id' (does not validate that the invoice/owner exists) - low risk for now

issues: Radix <SelectItem> warning observed once when statement_id list was empty - likely an empty-value SelectItem; main agent should verify all SelectItem values are non-empty strings

action_items: RESOLVED (fixed by testing agent): Trailing-slash 307 redirect on /api/meters/ and /api/documents/ was downgrading HTTPS→HTTP through ingress, causing Mixed Content blocks. Fixed by changing @router.get('/') -> @router.get('') and @router.post('/') -> @router.post('') in routes/meters.py and routes/documents.py.
Verify <SelectItem> in BankingPage does not pass empty string as value (Radix UI throws if value='').
Optional: add server-side validation in /api/banking/lettrage that match_to_id resolves to an actual invoice/owner.
critical_code_review_comments: Trailing-slash routes ('/') under a prefixed APIRouter cause FastAPI 307 redirects; behind an HTTPS-terminating ingress, the Location header may downgrade to http. Prefer '' over '/' for index routes.

Most CRUD endpoints under /api/owners, /api/lots, /api/tenants, /api/invoices etc. lack get_current_user dependency. They are unauthenticated. Consider adding Depends(get_current_user) at the router level for production.
JWT cookies set with secure=False - acceptable for preview but must be True in production.
/api/banking/lettrage does not verify that the match_to_id (invoice/owner) actually exists.
PCMN POST does not require auth; admin-only restriction recommended.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 9 sidebar pages load, login + owner-create modal verified, 0 console errors after fix)

seed_data_creation: Test data is created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up via session-scope autouse fixture in backend_test.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all 31 critical paths. Frontend Mixed Content issue is fixed. Remaining items: (1) verify BankingPage SelectItem value props, (2) optionally add auth dependencies to CRUD routers. CODA import was not tested with a real Belgian CODA file (the coda_parser module exists but no sample file was provided).
rca_of_the_issue: Mixed Content on /meters and /documents: FastAPI APIRouter with prefix='/api/meters' and route='/' creates endpoint '/api/meters/'. Frontend axios called '/api/meters' (no slash). FastAPI auto-redirect (307) returned Location with the original host but http scheme because the internal Uvicorn server is bound to http and the X-Forwarded-Proto header was not being applied to redirect URL construction. The browser blocks HTTP requests from an HTTPS page (Mixed Content). Mitigation: removed the trailing slash on the route definitions so the endpoint matches the frontend call exactly without a redirect.
